pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the agency, key services, featured work, and main calls-to-action.
primary_functions: Introduce the agencys value proposition and core services.
Provide quick access to Services, Work/Case Studies, Blog, Project Estimator, and Contact.
Highlight featured case studies and articles to encourage exploration.
Provide persistent access to Shortlist and Reading List via header icons/links.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary hero CTA (e.g., 'Explore services')
Click secondary hero CTA (e.g., 'Estimate a project')
Click a featured case study card title
Click 'View all insights' link in featured articles section
Click a featured article title

access_methods.description: Logo or home link in footer if present
Direct access via root URL or index.html

pages.name: Services Overview
pages.description: Overview of all service categories offered by the agency.
primary_functions: List main service categories such as Web Design & Development, Care & Maintenance, UX Research & Testing, and Branding & Visual Identity.
Let users click through to individual service detail pages.
Briefly explain when each service type is appropriate to guide users.
Provide clear paths into quoting, maintenance plans, research inquiries, and branding packages.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Web Design & Development' service card
Click 'Care & Maintenance' service card
Click 'UX Research & Testing' service card
Click 'Branding & Visual Identity' service card

access_methods.description: Linked from homepage core services section

pages.name: Web Design & Development
pages.description: Service detail page for web design and development, including a website redesign quote form.
primary_functions: Explain web design and development offerings, including new builds and redesigns.
Present a dedicated section for website redesign services.
Provide an inline 'Get a custom quote' form for web projects, including project type, pages, budget, timeline, and contact information.
Allow users to submit a website redesign quote request directly from the page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a secondary CTA such as 'Prefer email? Contact us about this project'

access_methods.description: Clicked from 'Web Design & Development' card on Services Overview
Indirectly via 'Services' then selecting this service

pages.name: Care & Maintenance
pages.description: Service detail page for ongoing website care and maintenance plans.
primary_functions: Explain what is included in care and maintenance (updates, support hours, monitoring, etc.).
Show a simplified overview of maintenance plans and pricing.
Provide a 'View full plan comparison' button linking to the detailed comparison table.
Guide users toward selecting and onboarding to a maintenance plan.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'View full plan comparison' button
Click 'Select plan' on a featured maintenance plan card

pages.name: Maintenance Plan Comparison
pages.description: Detailed comparison table of all care and maintenance plans with filters.
primary_functions: Display a comparison table of maintenance plans with features like support hours and pricing.
Allow users to filter plans by billing frequency (e.g., Monthly vs. Yearly).
Support scrolling through multiple plans while keeping key details visible.
Let users select a specific plan via a 'Select plan' button that leads to the plan signup page.

incoming_params.description: Initial billing frequency filter, e.g., 'monthly' or 'yearly'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Select plan' button in comparison table

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'View full plan comparison' button on Care & Maintenance page
Optional billing_frequency query parameter to preselect filter

pages.name: Maintenance Plan Signup
pages.description: Onboarding request form for a selected maintenance plan.
primary_functions: Show a summary of the selected maintenance plan, including monthly price and included support hours.
Collect company information such as company name, primary website URL, and preferred start date.
Allow users to request onboarding for the chosen maintenance plan via a 'Request onboarding' button.
Confirm submission so users know their maintenance onboarding request was received.

incoming_params.description: ID of the maintenance plan that the user selected.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to plans' link after viewing submission confirmation

access_methods.description: Accessed when a plan is selected with maintenance_plan_id query parameter
Displayed after clicking 'Select plan' on comparison or overview pages

pages.name: Case Studies
pages.description: Filterable portfolio of case studies across industries and goals.
primary_functions: Display a grid or list of case study cards with key metrics such as conversion rate increase.
Provide filters for industry (e.g., Ecommerce) and other relevant dimensions.
Allow sorting by metrics such as 'Conversion uplift  High to Low'.
Let users click a case study card title to open the full case study detail page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a case study card title

access_methods.description: Linked from homepage featured case studies 'View all work'

pages.name: Case Study Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single case study, including outcomes and metrics.
primary_functions: Present full narrative, visuals, and key metrics for a specific project (e.g., conversion rate increase).
Highlight quantitative results so users can evaluate impact (e.g., at least 20% conversion uplift).
Allow users to add or remove the case study from their Shortlist via an 'Add to shortlist' button.
Provide navigation back to the case study listing or onward to related work.

incoming_params.description: Slug of the case study to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View shortlist' link or header shortlist icon
Click 'Back to all case studies' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via slug query parameter from listings or saved shortlist

pages.name: Shortlist
pages.description: Users saved list of case studies they are interested in.
primary_functions: Display all case studies the user has added to their shortlist.
Allow users to click a saved case study title to open its detail page.
Offer options to remove items from the shortlist.
Help users review and compare shortlisted projects before contacting the agency.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the title of a saved case study

pages.name: Blog / Insights
pages.description: Blog hub with search, filters, and sorting for articles and insights.
primary_functions: List recent and featured articles with titles, tags, and estimated read time.
Provide a search field to search by keywords (e.g., 'SaaS onboarding').
Offer filters such as Year (e.g., 2023) and others like topic or category.
Allow sorting of results (e.g., 'Newest first').
Let users click an article title to view the full article detail page.

incoming_params.description: Current page number for paginated article results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article title in the list or search results

access_methods.description: Linked from homepage featured articles 'View all articles'

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for a single blog article.
primary_functions: Display the full article content with headings, images, tags, and estimated read time.
Show associated tags such as 'UX' or 'User Experience' so users can assess relevance.
Provide a 'Save to reading list' button to add the article to the users Reading List.
Allow normal reading interactions such as scrolling and navigating to related articles.

incoming_params.description: Slug of the article to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Reading list' icon/link in site header
Click 'Back to all articles' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via slug query parameter from blog listings or reading list

pages.name: Reading List
pages.description: Users saved list of articles to read or revisit later.
primary_functions: Display all articles previously saved to the reading list.
Allow users to click an article title to reopen the article detail page from the list.
Provide options to remove articles from the reading list.
Help users manage long-form content they intend to read or reference later.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the title of a saved article

pages.name: Project Estimator
pages.description: Interactive estimator for multi-part projects such as mobile apps plus websites.
primary_functions: Allow users to select project types (e.g., Mobile app, Marketing website).
Offer configuration of design complexity, integrations, analytics, and content creation tiers.
Calculate and display the total estimated project cost in real time.
Allow users to adjust options to keep the estimate at or under a target budget (e.g., $25,000).
Collect contact details and let users save the configured estimate via a 'Save estimate' button.

incoming_params.description: Optional flag to preselect mobile app as a project type.
Optional flag to preselect marketing website as a project type.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a CTA like 'Talk to us about this estimate'

access_methods.description: Linked from homepage hero or service CTAs

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page with contact form and link to discovery call scheduler.
primary_functions: Provide agency contact details such as email, phone, and office location.
Offer a general contact form for inquiries not tied to specific services or plans.
Include a prominent 'Book a discovery call' button that links to the discovery scheduler page.
Guide users toward appropriate next steps (discovery call, estimator, or specific service pages).

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected topic for the contact form, e.g., 'project_inquiry'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Book a discovery call' button

pages.name: Discovery Call Scheduler
pages.description: On-site scheduling interface for booking 30-minute discovery calls.
primary_functions: Allow users to select a time zone (including UTC or GMT).
Display a calendar for selecting a specific date, such as a Wednesday in the current month.
Show available 30-minute time slots and allow selection of the earliest morning slot between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM.
Collect booking details such as name, email, company, and discussion topic (e.g., New product design).
Confirm the booking via a 'Confirm booking' button and show confirmation details.

incoming_params.description: Optional month to preselect in the scheduler calendar (1-12).
Optional year to preselect in the scheduler calendar.
Optional time zone to preselect, e.g., 'utc' or 'gmt'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to contact' link after booking or if user cancels

access_methods.description: Accessed after clicking 'Book a discovery call' on Contact page
Optional month/year/time_zone parameters for deep-linking to specific calendar view

pages.name: UX Research & Testing
pages.description: Service detail page for UX research, usability testing, and hourly engagements.
primary_functions: Describe UX research and testing services, including typical activities and outcomes.
Provide a pricing section with a toggle between project-based and hourly pricing.
Allow users to set estimated hours (e.g., 80 hours) via slider or dropdown and see the resulting hourly rate.
Offer commitment or discount options that can bring the hourly rate under a given threshold (e.g., under $200/hour).
Include a 'Talk to us about this plan' button that reveals an inquiry form with subject selection, message, and contact info.
Let users submit an hourly UX research engagement inquiry via a 'Send inquiry' button.

pages.name: Branding & Visual Identity
pages.description: Service detail page for branding and visual identity, including package comparison.
primary_functions: Explain branding and visual identity services and deliverables.
Present a pricing section with a 'Compare packages' button that scrolls to or expands a comparison table on the same page.
Display a comparison table of branding packages with key inclusions such as number of logo concepts and brand guidelines document.
Allow users to identify packages that include at least 3 logo concepts and a brand guidelines document.
Provide 'View details' buttons for each package that lead to the specific Branding Package detail page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View details' on a branding package in the comparison table

pages.name: Branding Package Detail & Onboarding
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific branding package plus onboarding form.
primary_functions: Show full details of the selected branding package, including features and one-time price.
Allow users to select a billing option and ensure the 'One-time' option is active if desired.
List optional add-ons with checkboxes that can all be unchecked so no extras are selected.
Provide a 'Get started with this package' button that reveals or scrolls to the onboarding form on the same page.
Collect onboarding details including company name (e.g., Aurora Labs), industry (e.g., Technology), and planned brand launch date via date picker (e.g., October 1, 2026).
Let users continue to a summary/confirmation section on the page via a 'Continue to summary' button.

incoming_params.description: Slug of the branding package selected from the comparison table.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all branding packages' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via slug query parameter from Branding & Visual Identity page

header_links.description: Overview of all services, with links to individual service pages
Case studies and portfolio of client projects
Contact form and discovery call options
Saved case studies for later review

footer_links.description: Client work and detailed case studies
Get in touch or book a discovery call
Ongoing website care and support plans
UX research and usability testing services
